FreeBSD ololo 9.1-RELEASE FreeBSD 9.1-RELEASE #0 r243825: Tue Dec  4 09:23:10 UTC 2012     root@farrell.cse.buffalo.edu:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64
>Description:
Its ruby client for Tarantool Key-Value Storage.

Depended by: ports/178619 ports/178621 ports/178622 ports/178623
>How-To-Repeat:

>Fix:
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	rubygem-tarantool
#	rubygem-tarantool/pkg-descr
#	rubygem-tarantool/Makefile
#	rubygem-tarantool/distinfo
#
echo c - rubygem-tarantool
mkdir -p rubygem-tarantool > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - rubygem-tarantool/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >rubygem-tarantool/pkg-descr << '9e87b82f2d62fddb91214e779ae23ee4'
XIts ruby client for Tarantool Key-Value Storage
X
XWWW: https://github.com/mailru/tarantool-ruby
9e87b82f2d62fddb91214e779ae23ee4
echo x - rubygem-tarantool/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >rubygem-tarantool/Makefile << '317a65aafda8c8226834e7014cde833f'
X# Created by: Gvozdikov Veniamin <g.veniamin@googlemail.com>
X# $FreeBSD$
X
XPORTNAME=	tarantool
XPORTVERSION=	0.4.3.3
XCATEGORIES=	databases rubygems
XMASTER_SITES=	RG
X
XMAINTAINER=	g.veniamin@googlemail.com
XCOMMENT=	Tarantool KV-storage client
X
XRUN_DEPENDS=	rubygem-bin_utils=0.0.3:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-bin_utils \
X		rubygem-iproto>=0.3:${PORTSDIR}/net/rubygem-iproto \
X		rubygem-murmurhash3>=0.1.1:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-murmurhash3 \
X		rubygem-sumbur>=0.0.2:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-sumbur
X
XRUBY_VER=	1.9
XUSE_RUBY=	yes
XUSE_RUBYGEMS=	yes
XRUBYGEM_AUTOPLIST=	yes
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
317a65aafda8c8226834e7014cde833f
echo x - rubygem-tarantool/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >rubygem-tarantool/distinfo << '1c4b45721495977369eedc7418da3c6d'
XSHA256 (rubygem/tarantool-0.4.3.3.gem) = 5de65f2e2cab8aa7aa363ec977c28b6fa52df9f9f78d9f6bb14743b41d3a4339
XSIZE (rubygem/tarantool-0.4.3.3.gem) = 44032
1c4b45721495977369eedc7418da3c6d
exit
